user_message: Give me the manager view on this Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery exec meeting notes.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-24 09:16 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery whitespace analysis

There's been a change in our timeline for whitespace analysis. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
Date: 2024-02-03 16:26 EST
Subject: Re: Re: whitespace analysis Timeline

Our team encountered some challenges with whitespace analysis. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-13 08:17 EST
Subject: Follow-up: whitespace analysis Review

Just checking in on the whitespace analysis proposal. Our Director of IT is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery: there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Cross-Sell Trigger Email template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct whitespace analysis decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
